solution_criteria: System handles empty inputs gracefully without crashing
System either requests required information or provides a default response
System clearly communicates what information is needed to proceed
scenario: Testing with empty or minimal input to verify error handling and default behavior

prompt_inputs.goal: Build muscle mass while improving cardiovascular endurance

solution_criteria: Provides a nutrition plan that accommodates vegetarian diet and avoids dairy products
Includes specific macronutrient targets or food recommendations supporting both muscle building and cardiovascular goals
Offers practical, actionable guidance suitable for implementation within 1-2 weeks
scenario: Testing with real-world practical scenario to assess practical utility and accuracy

prompt_inputs.goal: Build muscle mass and increase strength while maintaining cardiovascular fitness for competitive powerlifting
prompt_inputs.restrictions: Vegan, gluten-free, severe peanut allergy, lactose intolerant

solution_criteria: Addresses all four input parameters (height, weight, goal, restrictions) in the response
Provides protein sources that satisfy vegan and allergy restrictions
Includes actionable recommendations aligned with muscle-building and powerlifting goals
Acknowledges the edge case complexity of multiple simultaneous dietary constraints
scenario: Testing with maximum complexity or edge case parameters to evaluate robustness
